cabana-1.name: Unique Moments Cabin
cabana-1.shortDescription: Your retreat in the heart of nature near Madrid. Cozy cabin surrounded by nature with spectacular views, pool, and chill out area.
cabana-1.description:
🌿 Your retreat in the heart of nature near Madrid

Escape the noise and enjoy a cozy cabin in the heart of nature, surrounded by tranquility and spectacular views. Just 5 minutes by car from the nearest town and with quick public transport connections to Madrid, you can disconnect without giving up comfort.

🏡 A space designed for enjoyment

The cabin has capacity for up to 5 people and comes with all amenities:
• Living room with integrated kitchen
• Bathroom with shower
• Bedroom with mosquito nets
• Additional sofa bed

Perfect for a couple's getaway, with friends or family.

🌞 Outdoor spaces and activities

Enjoy a spacious outdoor area ideal for relaxing or sharing moments:
• Pool available in summer ☀️
• Chill out area for nights under the stars
• Barbecue and dining table
• Space for children and pets

You can also go hiking, cycling, or visit nearby places like Patones de Arriba or El Escorial.

🐾 Nature and animals

Next to the cabin there is a small farm with rescued animals. If you want to interact with them, just ask us for permission 😊

🎉 Perfect for getaways and celebrations

An ideal place to disconnect or gather with your loved ones in a natural setting, with the possibility of extending the experience with camping tents (upon request).

cabana-2.name: Stunning Views Cabin
cabana-2.shortDescription: Unique loft cabin with spectacular views, 20 m² terrace, barbecue, and pool access. Perfect for disconnecting 30 min from Madrid.
cabana-2.description:
🌄 A unique cabin with incredible views

Discover a cozy loft-style cabin with its own personality, surrounded by nature and with spectacular views. A perfect place to disconnect and enjoy the tranquility, just 30 minutes from Madrid.

🏡 Comfortable and fully equipped space

The cabin, loft-style with abundant natural light, is designed to offer you a comfortable and relaxing stay:

• Capacity for up to 4 people
• Double bed + sofa bed
• Fully equipped kitchen
• Bathroom with shower
• Air conditioning and heating

Includes everything you need: washing machine, dryer, dishwasher, oven, microwave, coffee maker and more.

🌿 Outdoor space to enjoy all day

Relax on your private 20 m² terrace with open countryside views:

• Barbecue
• Chill out area
• Outdoor table

You can also access shared areas such as the pool and jacuzzi (subject to availability).

🐾 Nature, estate and coexistence

The cabin is located on an estate of more than 4 hectares, where there are other independent dwellings. Each accommodation maintains its privacy, although access paths and outdoor spaces are shared, so it is possible to encounter other guests.

We also have farm animals and our own vegetable garden 🌱

🐶 Pets welcome

You can bring your pet, as long as it is sociable, well-behaved and under control. It is important to respect other guests and animals on the estate.

📍 Location and access

Located in the heart of nature:

• 6 km from the nearest town
• 10 km from the train station (Colmenar Viejo)
• 30 minutes from Madrid

Access is via a dirt road, passable with normal vehicles. Having a car is essential, although we offer station pickup upon request.

🎉 Ideal for getaways or small celebrations

A perfect space to disconnect as a couple, with friends or family. There is also the possibility of organizing small gatherings using shared areas such as the pool (by reservation and with a supplement).

pool.name: Panoramic Pool
pool.description:
Our modern design pool with panoramic valley views is the perfect place to cool off and relax. Surrounded by green areas and with a comfortable solarium, it offers an exclusive space for our guests.

🏊 Design and features

The pool is carefully designed to maximize views and comfort:

• Panoramic valley views
• Solarium area with sun loungers
• Outdoor showers to cool off
• Lounge area to relax after swimming
• Green areas around for privacy
• Exclusive access for cabin guests

🌞 Open in summer

Enjoy the pool during the summer months, ideal for cooling off after exploring nature or simply for spending a relaxing day.

💎 The perfect place to relax

If you stay in any of our cabins, you will have free access to the pool. An oasis of tranquility surrounded by nature.
